## 🔍 Playwright PR Checklist

- [ ] No `waitForTimeout` used
- [ ] Stable locators (`getByRole`, `getByTestId`)
- [ ] Proper assertions added
- [ ] No `.only` / `.skip`
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Agents rules followed
